title: Gerascanthus goossensii
intro: Gerascanthus goossensii, also known as the "Kava of the Philippines", is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae, traditionally used as a medicinal plant. It is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anxiolytic properties, making it a popular remedy for stress relief and anxiety. The bioactive constituents of Gerascanthus goossensii include kavalactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant are traditional teas and infusions, as well as standardized extracts used in modern supplements and pharmaceuticals.
